# Your Brand

> Your Brand is a specialist consultancy building autonomous systems for the agentic economy. We help brands prepare for a world where AI agents — not humans — discover, evaluate, compare, and transact on behalf of consumers and businesses.

## Core Services

- [Agentic Commerce](https://example.com/agentic-commerce): Autonomous AI agent infrastructure for procurement, product discovery, and settlement.
- [Agentic Marketing](https://example.com/agentic-marketing): AI-native marketing systems including autonomous content, brand personas, and growth engines.
- [Agentic Payments](https://example.com/agentic-payments): Agent-to-agent payment infrastructure, autonomous settlement, and machine-readable transaction layers.
- [Agentic AEO](https://example.com/agentic-aeo): Answer Engine Optimisation — structured data, schema markup, and LLM citation strategy.
- [Agentic Strategy](https://example.com/agentic-strategy): Strategic consulting for brands entering the agentic economy.

## Content

- [News & Insights](https://example.com/news-insights): Editorial content covering agentic commerce, AEO, autonomous marketing, and the agent economy.

## Contact

- Email: hello@example.com
- Website: https://example.com
